message:
Merge PR #2750: Remove 'gt config show' from README

Remove reference to non-existent 'gt config show' command from README.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2750
Author: tpaulshippy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -384,9 +384,6 @@ gt config agent set codex-low "codex --thinking low"
 
 # Set default agent
 gt config default-agent claude-glm
-
-# View config
-gt config show
 ```
 
 ### Beads Integration
